title: crataegus collina var. collicola
intro: Crataegus collina var. collicola, also known as the hill hawthorn, is a variant of the hawthorn plant species that is native to Australia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of flavonoids, which have been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Crataegus collina var. collicola include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of heart disease. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be made by drying and processing the leaves and berries of the plant.
